description: Human gold labels for the P4 contradiction-finder eval. Each pair has a canonical pair_id (sha of sorted chunk IDs), the two chunk IDs, a gold label (factual | temporal | none), whether it is a true contradiction, and a one-line rationale.

pairs.label: factual
pairs.notes: A: Paris is capital of France. B: Lyon is capital of France. Direct factual conflict.

pairs.label: factual
pairs.notes: A: Berlin is capital of Germany. B: Hamburg is capital of Germany. Direct factual conflict.

pairs.label: factual
pairs.notes: A: Madrid is capital of Spain. B: Barcelona is capital of Spain. Direct factual conflict.

pairs.label: temporal
pairs.notes: Old note (2004): 9 planets. New note (2024): 8 planets after 2006 IAU reclassification. Temporal contradiction — older claim superseded.

pairs.label: factual
pairs.notes: A: WWII lasted 1939-1945 (6 years). B: WWII lasted 1939-1944 (5 years). Incompatible end dates.

pairs.label: factual
pairs.notes: A: Germany surrendered May 8 1945 (V-E Day). B: Germany surrendered June 6 1944 (D-Day). Incompatible surrender date.

pairs.label: factual
pairs.notes: A: Pacific war ended with atomic bombs Aug 1945. B: Pacific war ended 1944 with Manila treaty. Incompatible Pacific end event.

pairs.label: factual
pairs.notes: A: Human cells have 46 chromosomes. B: Human cells have 48 chromosomes. Direct numerical conflict.

pairs.label: factual
pairs.notes: A: Meiosis produces four haploid daughter cells. B: Meiosis produces two haploid daughter cells. Incompatible product count.

pairs.label: temporal
pairs.notes: Old note (2022): project uses SQLite. New note (2024): project uses PostgreSQL. Temporal stack change.

pairs.label: none
pairs.notes: Both say Earth is third planet from Sun. Not a contradiction — same fact restated.

pairs.label: none
pairs.notes: Both state Jupiter is the largest planet. Different supporting details but not conflicting.

pairs.label: none
pairs.notes: Both correctly describe mitosis producing two identical daughter cells. No conflict.

pairs.label: factual
pairs.notes: Already labeled above as factual (Pacific end) — duplicate check: verdict is true.

pairs.label: none
pairs.notes: Both describe backup strategies but for different databases at different times. Different methods (file copy vs pg_dump) but not contradictory — each is correct for its era.

pairs.label: none
pairs.notes: Both describe rationale for their respective DB choice. Different DBs at different times — complementary, not contradictory.

pairs.label: none
pairs.notes: A: Rome is capital of Italy. B: Hamburg is capital of Germany. Different countries — no contradiction.

pairs.label: none
pairs.notes: Espresso brewing vs knitting cast-on. Completely unrelated topics.

pairs.label: none
pairs.notes: Yeast fermentation vs deductive reasoning. Completely unrelated topics.

pairs.label: none
pairs.notes: Sourdough starter vs yarn weight. Completely unrelated topics.

pairs.label: none
pairs.notes: DNA replication (S phase) vs mitosis definition. Related topic, complementary facts — not contradictory.

pairs.label: none
pairs.notes: Deductive reasoning vs inductive reasoning. Contrasting concepts but both correctly described — not contradictory.

pairs.label: none
pairs.notes: Moon orbital distance vs Earth position from Sun. Related astronomical facts but not in conflict.

pairs.label: none
pairs.notes: WWII casualty count vs WWII duration. Same event, different attributes — not contradictory.
